nasb.text: Now if we put the bits into the horses’ mouths so that they will obey us, we direct their entire body as well.

esv.text: If we put bits into the mouths of horses so that they obey us, we guide their whole bodies as well.

cnv.text: 我們若把嚼環扣入馬嘴，使牠們馴服，就能駕馭牠們的全身。

ccb.text: 我们如果把嚼环放在马嘴里，便可以使它顺服，驾驭它。

csbs.text: 我们如果把嚼子放在马嘴里，使它们服从，就可以驾驭它们的全身。
